highlights: AI agents are evolving with self-improving memory systems and enhanced customization, enabling more robust and specialized automation.
New models are emerging with strong reasoning capabilities and efficient multilingual search, making advanced AI more accessible for diverse applications and edge deployment.

Major AI companies are intensifying their enterprise focus through strategic partnerships, acquisitions, and improved management tools, alongside open-sourcing critical development tools for prompt optimization and performance.

agents.title: Perplexity Launches Brain: A Self-Improving Memory System for Agents
agents.summary: Perplexity has launched Brain, a self-improving memory system for its Computer agent that builds a traceable context graph, learns overnight, and improves correctness, recall, and cost, offering a significant leap in agent autonomy.

agents.title: Nous Research Updates Hermes Agent with Blank Slate Mode for Toolset Pinning
agents.summary: Nous Research has updated its open-source Hermes Agent with a Blank Slate mode, allowing developers to start with minimal tools and precisely opt-in to specific functionalities, enhancing control and security for agent operations.

agents.title: NVIDIA AI Introduces SpatialClaw: Training-Free Agent for Spatial Reasoning via Code
agents.summary: NVIDIA AI unveiled SpatialClaw, a training-free agent that leverages Python code in a persistent kernel to compose perception tools, enabling advanced 3D spatial reasoning for complex tasks.

models.title: OpenAI Improves Health Intelligence in ChatGPT with GPT-5.5 Instant
models.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Instant model now significantly improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses through stronger reasoning, better context understanding, and clearer communication, informed by physician evaluations.

models.title: Liquid AI Releases LFM2.5 Models for Fast Multilingual Search
models.summary: Liquid AI has introduced LFM2.5-Embedding-350M and LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M, dense bi-encoder and late-interaction models designed for fast, accurate multilingual search across 11 languages, optimized for edge devices.

models.title: VibeThinker-3B: A New 3B Dense Reasoning Model Matches Top Performers
models.summary: VibeThinker-3B, a 3B MIT-licensed dense reasoning model built on Qwen2.5-Coder-3B, has been released, demonstrating performance comparable to DeepSeek V3.2 and Kimi K2.5 on verifiable benchmarks.

tools.title: Cisco AI Open-Sources FAPO: Pipeline-Aware Prompt Optimization System
tools.summary: Cisco Foundation AI has open-sourced FAPO (Fully Automated Prompt Optimization), a Claude Code-driven system that autonomously optimizes multi-step LLM pipelines by attributing failures and proposing variants, significantly improving accuracy.

tools.title: Yandex Open-Sources YaFF: Zero-Copy Wire Format for Protobuf with Near-Struct Speed
tools.summary: Yandex has open-sourced YaFF, a zero-copy wire format for the Protobuf ecosystem, offering near-struct read speeds and CPU savings (10-20% in production), optimizing data handling while maintaining the .proto file as the single source of truth.

tools.title: OpenAI Introduces LifeSciBench: A Benchmark for Life Science AI Evaluation
tools.summary: OpenAI has launched LifeSciBench, an expert-authored and reviewed benchmark designed to evaluate AI systems on real-world life science research tasks and decision-making, providing a critical tool for advancing AI in scientific discovery.

companies.title: OpenAI Launches Partner Network with $150M Investment
companies.summary: OpenAI has launched its Partner Network, committing $150 million to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation, fostering broader integration of AI solutions.

companies.title: OpenAI to Acquire Ona for Enhanced Codex and AI Agents
companies.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex capabilities with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling the development and deployment of long-running AI agents across diverse enterprise workflows.

companies.title: OpenAI Enhances ChatGPT Enterprise with Usage Analytics and Spend Controls
companies.summary: OpenAI has introduced new usage analytics and updated spend controls for ChatGPT Enterprise, providing organizations with better tools to manage costs and confidently scale their AI deployments.

learning.title: Tutorial: Build a Web Crawling Pipeline with Crawlee for Python and RAG Export
learning.summary: A new tutorial demonstrates building a complete Crawlee for Python workflow, covering web crawling with various tools, data normalization, link graph generation, and exporting RAG-ready JSONL chunks.

learning.title: Salesforce CodeGen Tutorial: Generate, Validate, and Rerank Python Functions
learning.summary: This tutorial provides an end-to-end workflow for Salesforce CodeGen, detailing how to generate, validate with unit tests and safety checks, and rerank Python functions for robust program synthesis.

learning.title: OpenAI Academy Launches New Courses for Practical AI Skills
learning.summary: OpenAI has introduced three new Academy courses designed to help individuals build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply AI agents effectively in their daily work environments.
